summary: tidy-csv is a TypeScript command-line tool, run with bun, for cleaning and summarizing CSV files: a dedupe command that removes duplicate rows and a stats command that reports per-column fill counts. No frameworks — only bun builtins and a small hand-rolled CSV parser. A bash release script packages tarballs into dist/.

entrypoints.description: CLI main; package.json bin "tidy-csv", dispatches the dedupe and stats subcommands

key_directories.role: one module per CLI subcommand (dedupe, stats)
shared CSV parse/write helpers plus their bun test
release tooling (release.sh builds the dist tarball)
